channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Senator calls RFK Jr.’s position on race and vaccines dangerous
item.description: In one of the most tense exchanges in a heated confirmation hearing, Senator Angela Alsobrooks called out past comments RFK Jr. made suggesting a different vaccine schedule for Black people.
item.dc:creator: Will Stone, MPR News

item.title: The DNC's outgoing chair says Democrats should have stuck with Joe Biden in 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the Democratic National Committee prepares to elect a new chair, its departing leader says Democrats should have stuck with Joe Biden in the 2024 race.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Weekend vote to decide if Ken Martin jumps from Minnesota Democratic perch to national party head
item.description: Members of the Democratic National Committee are due to vote Saturday on who will lead the party. After 2024 election, Democrats are regrouping.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Lawmakers clash over immigration policies, in-state tuition for Dreamers
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (WFLA) — As Gov. Ron DeSantis and legislative leaders in Tallahassee clash on immigration proposals, DeSantis said he's planning to veto the recently passed TRUMP Act. That move could put lawmakers back to square one.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump VA pick Doug Collins advances to full Senate vote
item.description: Doug Collins, President Donald Trump's nominee for VA chief, passed a Senate cloture vote Thursday night and will proceed to a full vote on the Senate floor for confirmation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate advances Trump's energy secretary nominee to final confirmation vote
item.description: President Donald Trump's pick to head the Department of Energy, Chris Wright, has advanced to a final confirmation vote in the Senate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republicans advance Trump OMB nominee as Democrats boycott vote
item.description: Senate Republicans advanced the nomination of Russell Vought to lead the White House budget office as Democrats boycotted the meeting to protest the administration's recent efforts to freeze large swaths of federal funding.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Trump blames diversity hiring as probe into deadly DC plane crash begins
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the nation reeled from the deadliest American aviation disaster in more than two decades, President Donald Trump on Thursday baselessly blamed diversity initiatives for undermining air safety and questioned the actions of a U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Missouri woman pardoned for Jan. 6 offenses sentenced in deadly drunken-driving crash
item.description: Emily Hernandez, a Missouri woman pardoned after her ties to the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, was sentenced Wednesday in connection with a drunken-driving crash.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, Fox 5

item.title: Trump was challenged after blaming DEI for the DC plane crash. Here's what he said
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — President Donald Trump began his White House briefing Thursday with a moment of silence and a prayer for victims of Wednesday's crash at Reagan National Airport.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump FCC chair targets NPR, PBS for investigation ahead of Congressional threats to defund
item.description: FCC chair, Republican Brendan Carr, reportedly sent a letter to NPR and PBS announcing the launch of an investigation into potential airing of 'prohibited commercial' ads.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patel dodges, demurs as Democrats press him on controversial statements
item.description: Kash Patel, President Trump’s pick to lead the FBI, wouldn’t acknowledge or sought to distance himself from a host of his past public statements as Democrats pressed him during his confirmation hearing on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Risch proposes bill to block US foreign aid from funding abortions
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Senate Foreign Relations Committee Chairman Jim Risch and GOP senators on Thursday are expected to roll out a measure that would prohibit the use of U.S. foreign aid funds for abortions, Fox News Digital has learned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GOP senator 'surprised' Gabbard refused to call Snowden a traitor
item.description: Sen. James Lankford (R-Okla.), a member of the Senate Intelligence Committee, said he was “surprised” that director of national intelligence nominee Tulsi Gabbard refused to call former NSA contractor Edward Snowden a “traitor” after being repeatedly pressed on the question at a Thursday hearing.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats revolt against Trump in fallout from foreign aid freeze
item.description: Senate Democrats are starting to revolt against President Trump’s agenda on Capitol Hill amid fallout from an initial freeze on all foreign assistance, warning Republicans that failure to work together will incur consequences. Sen. Chris Coons (D-Del.) on Thursday reversed support for Rep.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: President Trump casts blame during briefing on deadly plane crash
item.description: President Donald Trump started Thursday’s press briefing with a moment of silence for the victims and their families after a deadly crash involving an American Airlines plane and an Army helicopter near Ronald Reagan National Airport on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, Fox 5

item.title: Watch live: Kash Patel faces senators at confirmation hearing
item.description: Kash Patel, President Trump's controversial nominee to head the FBI, will face senators Thursday morning during a confirmation hearing.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: The effects of the Trump administration’s efforts to roll back DEI initiatives
item.description: MPR News host Angela Davis and her guests talk about the steps President Donald Trump has taken to dismantle the federal government’s diversity, equity and inclusion programs and how some private companies have responded.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis and Cari Dwyer, MPR News

item.title: Gabbard, RFK Jr., Patel hearings set to consume Capitol Hill
item.description: Hearing-mania is set to consume Capitol Hill on Thursday as a trio of President Trump's top allies appear for high-stakes confirmation showdowns with senators that could make or break their chances of getting across the finish line. Tulsi Gabbard, Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans leave Florida frustrated with lack of final plan to pass Trump agenda
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) arrived at this week’s House Republican retreat with hopes of uniting the fractious GOP conference around a plan to pass President Trump's agenda — but instead, the group is departing south Florida with rising tensions in its ranks. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's pulling a U-turn on EVs, but not much has changed
item.description: President Donald Trump has charted a new course for electric vehicle policy in the U.S. While the direction is clear, the details aren't.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske, MPR News

item.title: Trump order cracks down on antisemitism and could deport foreign student protesters
item.description: The executive order directs government agencies to use all available tools to prosecute or remove perpetrators of antisemitic harassment and violence, especially on college campuses.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: Fewer than half in new poll trust Trump, RFK Jr. to make right health recommendations
item.description: The latest KFF survey finds 42 percent of respondents say they have either a great deal or fair amount of trust in Trump to make the right recommendations when it comes to health issues.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Trump orders Education, Labor and other departments to enhance school choice
item.description: The president directed several departments to submit plans for using federal funds to expand school choice.
item.dc:creator: Jonaki Mehta, MPR News

item.title: Trump orders Guantanamo Bay readied for criminal migrants
item.description: The United States has previously held a small number of migrants within Naval Station Guantanamo Bay in Cuba.
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Democrats demand Patel information in special counsel's classified documents report
item.description: Democrats on the Senate Judiciary Committee are demanding to see the volume of former special counsel Jack Smith’s report dealing with the Mar-a-Lago classified documents investigation, asserting it has relevant information about Kash Patel, President Trump’s pick to lead the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Minnesota ACLU: Local jurisdictions have the right to not cooperate with immigration enforcement
item.description: During President Donald Trump’s first week in office, his new Department of Justice announced plans to potentially criminally prosecute local and state officials who fail to “comply with lawful immigration-related commands and requests.
item.dc:creator: Tom Crann and Ngoc Bui, MPR News

item.title: Fetterman to attend Laken Riley Act bill signing
item.description: “I believe a secure border creates a more secure nation and it’s just common sense," Fetterman said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Harris team planned Houston rally with Joe Rogan in mind
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris made a substantial effort to get on Joe Rogan’s popular podcast amid concerns about her traction with male voters — going so far as to plan a Houston rally to justify a stop at Rogan’s Austin studio, according to a forthcoming book.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: A Democratic Party in crisis will elect its new chairman on Saturday
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Democratic National Committee will elect a new chair on Saturday as the party seeks new leadership to guide Democrats through Donald Trump's second presidency. Eight candidates have lined up to replace outgoing Chair Jaime Harrison.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fewer than half in new poll trust Trump, RFK Jr. to make right recommendations on health issues
item.description: Fewer than half of Americans in a new poll say they trust President Trump or his health-related nominees to make recommendations on the nation's pressing health care issues.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida House and Senate leaders take charge in special session showdown
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis pushed for a special session to help boost President Donald Trump's immigration efforts. But that session was blocked by Senate and House leadership Monday.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC
